step_rationale: PDZK1 regulates HDL receptor (SR-BI) trafficking; controls lipoprotein metabolism and reverse cholesterol transport.
mechanism: PDZK1 scaffolding regulates SR-BI expression and HDL-mediated cholesterol efflux, influencing lipid retention in the subendothelium.

references.title: Influence of PDZK1 on lipoprotein metabolism and atherosclerosis.
